<!--
Thanks for contributing to lograft!

Before submitting, please confirm:
- `pnpm test` passes
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
- `pnpm lint` passes
- No `WIN`, `playSWEEPS`, or `playstudios` strings under `src/` (CI grep guard
  will fail otherwise — see plan D29 / R9).
- `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`.
- For new behaviour: tests added.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (tool / adapter / capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (tool schema, public API)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Type-check passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] No PII in fixtures or test data
- [ ] No org-specific strings in `src/`
- [ ] If breaking the public tool surface: SemVer impact noted

## Related issues / plan references

<!-- e.g. closes #42, addresses plan TASK-9b -->
